text: Did you know that more contagious diseases need higher immunity coverage? Herd immunity thresholds aren't one-size-fits-all. They vary based on the disease. For example, measles needs about 95% immunity to halt outbreaks. Why so high? More transmissible viruses like COVID-19 require similar thresholds. The data is clear. Understanding these thresholds helps us prepare and protect ourselves better. Stay informed about vaccines and herd immunity. Follow for more insights.
